narrative:
Commercial Point-West (precinct in Pickaway County) has 768 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.4 percentage points.
